steps.title: Convert the percent increase
steps.content:
A $6\%$ increase means the salary keeps the original $100\%$ and adds $6\%$ more.
$$100\%+6\%=106\%$$

steps.title: Write the growth factor
steps.content: Convert $106\%$ to a decimal multiplier. $$106\%=1.06$$ In $S(n)=42{,}000\cdot a^n$, $a$ is this yearly multiplier. The answer is C.
